---
title: "CS 203: Software Tools and Techniques for AI"
subtitle: "IIT Gandhinagar · Jan 2026 · Prof. Nipun Batra"
---

[Course website](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-26/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub repo](https://github.com/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

---

## Part I: Data (Weeks 1–5) {.data-section}

| Week | Topic | Slides | Hands-On |
|:----:|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| 1 | Data Collection | [HTML](html/week01-data-collection-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week01-data-collection-lecture.pdf) | [Lab](labs/week01-data-collection-lab.html) |
| 2 | Data Validation & Quality | [HTML](html/week02-data-validation-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week02-data-validation-lecture.pdf) | [Lab](labs/week02-data-validation-lab.html) |
| 3 | Data Labeling & Annotation | [HTML](html/week03-data-labeling-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week03-data-labeling-lecture.pdf) | [Lab](labs/week03-data-labeling-lab.html) |
| 4 | Optimizing Labeling | [HTML](html/week04-optimizing-labeling-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week04-optimizing-labeling-lecture.pdf) | [Lab](labs/week04-optimizing-labeling-lab.html) |
| 5 | Data Augmentation | [HTML](html/week05-data-augmentation-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week05-data-augmentation-lecture.pdf) | [Lab](labs/week05-data-augmentation-lab.html) |

## Part II: Models (Weeks 6–8) {.models-section}

| Week | Topic | Slides | Hands-On |
|:----:|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| 6 | LLM APIs & Multimodal AI | [HTML](html/week06-llm-apis-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week06-llm-apis-lecture.pdf) | [Lab](labs/week06-llm-apis-lab.html) |
| 7 | Model Evaluation | [HTML](html/week07-model-development-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week07-model-development-lecture.pdf) | [Notebook](lecture-demos/week07/week07_evaluation_notebook.html) · [Lab](labs/week07-model-development-lab.html) |
| 8 | Tuning, AutoML & Tracking | [HTML](html/week08-tuning-tracking-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week08-tuning-tracking-lecture.pdf) | [Notebook](lecture-demos/week08/tuning_tracking_notebook.html) |

## Part III: Engineering (Weeks 9–13) {.engineering-section}

| Week | Topic | Slides | Hands-On |
|:----:|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| 9 | Reproducibility: Docker, Seeds & Tracking | [HTML](html/week09-reproducibility-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week09-reproducibility-lecture.pdf) | [Docker Demos](https://github.com/nipunbatra/docker-ml-demos) |
| 10 | Data Drift & Model Monitoring | [HTML](html/week10-data-drift-lecture.html) | [Notebook](lecture-demos/week10/data_drift_notebook.html) |
| 11 | Profiling & Quantization | [HTML](html/week11-profiling-quantization-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week11-profiling-quantization-lecture.pdf) | [Colab Notebooks](lecture-demos/week11/colab-notebooks/) |
| 12 | Building AI Agents | [HTML](html/week12-agents-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week12-agents-lecture.pdf) | [Colab Notebook](https://colab.research.google.com/github/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/lecture-demos/week12/colab-notebooks/01-agents-from-scratch.ipynb) |
| 13 | Course Summary | [HTML](html/week13-course-summary-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week13-course-summary-lecture.pdf) | |

## Additional Content {.additional-section}

| Topic | Slides | Hands-On |
|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| From Script to Web App | [HTML](html/week10-web-apps-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week10-web-apps-lecture.pdf) | |
| CI/CD & Automation | [HTML](html/week11-cicd-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week11-cicd-lecture.pdf) | |
| APIs & Demos | [HTML](html/week12-apis-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/week12-apis-lecture.pdf) | [Follow-along](https://github.com/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/lecture-demos/week12/apis_followalong.sh) · [PDF](lecture-demos/week12/apis_followalong.pdf) |
